description: Use a Bitwarden vault as CodeTerm's secret store, via the `bw` CLI. Unlock from the plugin view, then `codeterm mem secret` reads/writes go to your vault.
configHelp: Bitwarden makes a Bitwarden vault CodeTerm's secret store via the `bw` CLI. Install the Bitwarden CLI (`bw`), open the plugin view, and unlock the vault there; after that `codeterm mem secret` reads and writes go to your vault. Knobs (set with `codeterm plugin config bitwarden --set key=value`): `serverUrl` — the Bitwarden server, cloud or self-hosted (default https://vault.bitwarden.com). Your master password / API key are entered in the unlock view, not stored in settings.
